summary: Completed comprehensive testing of client edit functionality. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all edit fields, password reset, and mobile validation working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all edit fields, password reset, validation working)

seed_data_creation: Created test clients during pytest execution for edit testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client edit functionality fully tested and working: 1) PUT /api/clients/{id} updates all fields (full_name, mobile, email, age, guardian_name, address, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_phone, intake_summary, profile_photo). 2) Mobile validation enforces exactly 10 digits. 3) Email uniqueness check prevents duplicate emails. 4) POST /api/clients/{id}/reset-password allows therapists to reset client passwords. 5) GET /api/clients and GET /api/clients/{id} return profile_photo field. 6) client_id remains immutable after updates. 7) Frontend edit dialog shows all editable fields with Client ID marked as immutable. 8) Frontend validates mobile format before submission. 9) Password reset dialog with auto-generate and regenerate functionality.

frontend_ui_tests.all_editable_fields_present: PASS - full_name, mobile, email, age, guardian_name, referred_by, address, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_phone, intake_summary, profile_photo
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_validation_frontend: PASS - shows error toast for invalid mobile
